judgeScores.justification: Missing critical requirements: no streaming/large file support (loads entire string into memory) and lacks TypeScript generics (heavy use of 'any' instead of typed returns). Correctly handles quoted fields with commas and escaped quotes, but the API design mixes parsing with data analysis (filter/sum/average methods on result object), violating separation of concerns. Tests verify behavior but miss testing newlines within quoted fields and don't use a proper testing framework.
